commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a blocking Deadcode audit step to CI, bumps the Go directive from 1.25.10 to 1.25.11, and pins the GoReleaser check action to v2.15.4.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a CI policy change rather than a reported runtime bug. The diff directly shows the new workflow behavior that needs review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Needs workflow-owner judgment on enforcing Deadcode as a blocking CI gate; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: ci: add deadcode check
target.body:
## Summary
- add an enforced Go deadcode CI gate pinned to `golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.45.0`
- make the workflow fail when deadcode emits findings
- bump the Go directive to the patched 1.25.11 toolchain so existing govulncheck stays green
- pin GoReleaser check to v2.15.4 to avoid unrelated v2.16 `brews` deprecation breakage

## Validation
- `git diff --check`
- `go run golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.45.0 -test ./...`
- `GOTOOLCHAIN=go1.25.11+auto go test -count=1 ./...`
- `GOTOOLCHAIN=go1.25.11+auto go run golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@v1.3.0 ./...`
- `go build ./cmd/goplaces`
- `autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --thinking low` clean
target.author: vincentkoc
